queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, rqs.name AS status, p.name AS project_name FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id ORDER BY q.issue_date DESC LIMIT 10
queries.description: Liste des 10 devis les plus récents avec détails du client et projet associé

queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.validity_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE rqs.code = '[STATUS]' OR rqs.name ILIKE '%[STATUS]%' ORDER BY q.issue_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis filtrés par statut

questions: Quels sont les devis pour le client [CLIENT] ?
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.validity_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, rqs.name AS status, p.name AS project_name FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE (c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname) ILIKE '%[CLIENT]%' OR c.email ILIKE '%[CLIENT]%' ORDER BY q.issue_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis associés à un client spécifique

questions: Quels sont les devis pour le projet [PROJECT] ?
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.validity_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, rqs.name AS status FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE p.name ILIKE '%[PROJECT]%' OR p.id::text = '[PROJECT]' ORDER BY q.issue_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis associés à un projet spécifique

queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.validity_date, q.total_ht, q.tva_rate, q.total_ttc, rqs.name AS status, p.name AS project_name, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, c.email AS client_email, c.phone AS client_phone, q.payment_conditions, q.notes FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE q.reference ILIKE '%[REFERENCE]%' OR q.id::text = '[REFERENCE]'
queries.description: Détails complets d'un devis spécifique

questions: Détail des produits pour le devis [REFERENCE]
Lignes de produits dans le devis [REFERENCE]
queries.sql: SELECT qp.id, qp.description, qp.quantity, qp.unit_price, qp.total_price, rpc.name AS category FROM quotation_products qp LEFT JOIN ref_product_categories rpc ON qp.category = rpc.id JOIN quotations q ON qp.quotation_id = q.id WHERE q.reference ILIKE '%[REFERENCE]%' OR q.id::text = '[REFERENCE]' ORDER BY qp.id
queries.description: Liste détaillée des produits inclus dans un devis spécifique

questions: Devis avec date de validité proche
Liste des devis qui expirent dans les [DAYS] jours
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.validity_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name, (q.validity_date - CURRENT_DATE) AS days_left FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE q.validity_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '[DAYS] days') AND rqs.code = 'en_attente' ORDER BY q.validity_date
queries.description: Liste des devis qui expirent prochainement et sont encore en attente

questions: Devis avec date de validité dépassée
Devis dont la validité est terminée
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.validity_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name, (CURRENT_DATE - q.validity_date) AS days_overdue FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE q.validity_date < CURRENT_DATE AND rqs.code = 'en_attente' ORDER BY q.validity_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis qui ont dépassé leur date de validité mais sont toujours en attente

questions: Quels devis ont été créés ce mois-ci ?
Liste des devis émis ce mois
Devis établis durant le mois courant
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, rqs.name AS status FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM q.issue_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM q.issue_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY q.issue_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis créés dans le mois courant

questions: Quels devis ont été acceptés ce mois-ci ?
Devis validés dans le mois courant
Liste des devis acceptés ce mois
Devis confirmés durant le mois en cours
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE rqs.code = 'accepté' AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM q.updated_at) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM q.updated_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY q.updated_at DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis acceptés dans le mois courant

questions: Quels sont les devis avec les montants les plus élevés ?
Liste des devis par montant décroissant
Devis avec les plus grands montants
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name, rqs.name AS status FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id ORDER BY q.total_ht DESC LIMIT 10
queries.description: Liste des 10 devis avec les montants les plus élevés

questions: Quel est le taux de conversion des devis ?
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_quotations, SUM(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'accepté' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS accepted_quotations, ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'accepté' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::decimal / COUNT(*)) * 100, 2) AS conversion_rate FROM quotations q JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE q.issue_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
queries.description: Calcul du taux de conversion des devis (pourcentage de devis acceptés) sur la dernière année

questions: Quels devis contiennent des produits de catégorie [CATEGORY] ?
queries.sql: SELECT DISTINCT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name, rqs.name AS status FROM quotations q JOIN quotation_products qp ON q.id = qp.quotation_id JOIN ref_product_categories rpc ON qp.category = rpc.id JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE rpc.name ILIKE '%[CATEGORY]%' OR rpc.code ILIKE '%[CATEGORY]%' ORDER BY q.issue_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis qui contiennent des produits d'une catégorie spécifique

parameters.name: CATEGORY
parameters.description: Catégorie de produit (matériaux, main_doeuvre, transport, autres)

questions: Quels devis ne sont pas liés à un projet actif ?
Devis dont le projet n'est pas actif
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name, p_status.name AS project_status FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id JOIN ref_status p_status ON p.status = p_status.id WHERE p_status.code != 'en_cours' AND rqs.code = 'accepté' ORDER BY q.issue_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis acceptés mais dont le projet associé n'est pas en cours

questions: Quelle est la moyenne des montants des devis par mois ?
Evolution mensuelle des montants de devis
queries.sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM q.issue_date) AS year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM q.issue_date) AS month, TO_CHAR(q.issue_date, 'Month YYYY') AS month_name, COUNT(*) AS quotation_count, ROUND(AVG(q.total_ht), 2) AS average_amount_ht FROM quotations q WHERE q.issue_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months' GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM q.issue_date), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM q.issue_date), TO_CHAR(q.issue_date, 'Month YYYY') ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM q.issue_date) DESC, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM q.issue_date) DESC
queries.description: Statistiques des montants moyens de devis par mois sur les 12 derniers mois

questions: Quels devis sont en attente de validation ?
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.validity_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name, c.phone AS client_phone, c.email AS client_email, (CURRENT_DATE - q.issue_date) AS days_outstanding FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE rqs.code = 'en_attente' AND q.validity_date > CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY (CURRENT_DATE - q.issue_date) DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis en attente de validation et toujours valides avec coordonnées client pour relance

questions: Quel est le résumé des devis ce mois-ci ?
Résumé des devis du mois en cours
Bilan des devis du mois courant
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_quotations, COUNT(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'accepté' THEN 1 END) as accepted_quotations, COUNT(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'en_attente' THEN 1 END) as pending_quotations, COUNT(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'refusé' THEN 1 END) as rejected_quotations, SUM(total_ttc) as total_amount, ROUND(AVG(total_ttc), 2) as average_amount FROM quotations q JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM q.issue_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM q.issue_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
queries.description: Résumé des devis du mois en cours avec statistiques et montants

questions: Quels sont les devis entre [MIN_AMOUNT]€ et [MAX_AMOUNT]€ ?
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name, rqs.name AS status FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE q.total_ttc BETWEEN [MIN_AMOUNT] AND [MAX_AMOUNT] ORDER BY q.total_ttc DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis dont le montant est compris dans une fourchette spécifique

questions: Quels devis n'ont pas de produits ?
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM quotation_products qp WHERE qp.quotation_id = q.id) ORDER BY q.issue_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis qui n'ont pas de produits associés

questions: Quels devis ont une remise importante ?
Liste des devis avec remise importante
Quels devis ont une grosse remise ?
Liste des devis avec forte remise
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, q.discount_percentage, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id WHERE q.discount_percentage > 10 ORDER BY q.discount_percentage DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis avec une remise supérieure à 10%

questions: Quels devis ont des conditions de paiement [TERMS] ?
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ttc, q.payment_conditions, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id WHERE q.payment_conditions ILIKE '%[TERMS]%' ORDER BY q.issue_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis avec des conditions de paiement spécifiques

questions: Quels devis acceptés n'ont pas de facture ?
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ttc, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE rqs.code = 'accepté' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM invoices i WHERE i.quotation_id = q.id) ORDER BY q.issue_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis acceptés qui n'ont pas encore de facture associée

questions: Quels devis ont plus de [COUNT] produits ?
Liste des devis avec plus de [COUNT] produits
Quels devis ont plus de [COUNT] articles ?
Liste des devis plus de [COUNT] produits
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ttc, COUNT(qp.id) as product_count, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN quotation_products qp ON q.id = qp.quotation_id GROUP BY q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ttc, c.firstname, c.lastname, p.name HAVING COUNT(qp.id) > [COUNT] ORDER BY COUNT(qp.id) DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis ayant plus d'un certain nombre de produits

questions: Quelle est l'évolution des devis par mois ?
Évolution des devis dans le temps
queries.sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM q.issue_date) AS year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM q.issue_date) AS month, TO_CHAR(q.issue_date, 'Month YYYY') AS month_name, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'accepté' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS accepted_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'refusé' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected_count, ROUND(AVG(q.total_ttc), 2) AS average_amount, ROUND(SUM(q.total_ttc), 2) AS total_amount, ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'accepté' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::decimal / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) * 100, 2) AS conversion_rate FROM quotations q JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE q.issue_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months' GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM q.issue_date), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM q.issue_date), TO_CHAR(q.issue_date, 'Month YYYY') ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM q.issue_date), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM q.issue_date)
queries.description: Tableau complet de performance des devis par mois (nombre, montant, taux de conversion)

questions: Quels sont les devis les plus rentables ?
Quels devis ont la plus grande marge ?
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, ROUND(qp.total_margin, 2) AS total_margin, ROUND((qp.total_margin / NULLIF(q.total_ht, 0)) * 100, 2) AS margin_percentage, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name, rqs.name AS status FROM quotations q JOIN (SELECT quotation_id, SUM((unit_price - unit_cost) * quantity) AS total_margin FROM quotation_products GROUP BY quotation_id) qp ON q.id = qp.quotation_id JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id ORDER BY qp.total_margin DESC LIMIT 10
queries.description: Liste des 10 devis avec les meilleures marges et pourcentages de rentabilité

questions: Quels devis ont une marge faible ?
Quels devis ont une marge inférieure à [THRESHOLD] % ?
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, ROUND(qp.total_margin, 2) AS total_margin, ROUND((qp.total_margin / NULLIF(q.total_ht, 0)) * 100, 2) AS margin_percentage, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name, rqs.name AS status FROM quotations q JOIN (SELECT quotation_id, SUM((unit_price - unit_cost) * quantity) AS total_margin FROM quotation_products GROUP BY quotation_id) qp ON q.id = qp.quotation_id JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE (qp.total_margin / NULLIF(q.total_ht, 0)) * 100 < [THRESHOLD] AND rqs.code = 'en_attente' ORDER BY (qp.total_margin / NULLIF(q.total_ht, 0)) * 100 ASC
queries.description: Liste des devis en attente avec une marge inférieure au seuil défini

parameters.name: THRESHOLD
parameters.description: Seuil de marge minimum en pourcentage

questions: Quels sont les devis créés par [COMMERCIAL] ?
queries.sql: SELECT q.id, q.reference, q.issue_date, q.total_ht, q.total_ttc, rqs.name AS status, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, p.name AS project_name FROM quotations q JOIN projects p ON q.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id JOIN users u ON q.created_by = u.id WHERE u.firstname ILIKE '%[COMMERCIAL]%' OR u.lastname ILIKE '%[COMMERCIAL]%' OR (u.firstname || ' ' || u.lastname) ILIKE '%[COMMERCIAL]%' ORDER BY q.issue_date DESC
queries.description: Liste des devis créés par un commercial spécifique

questions: Comment les devis ont évolué entre [PERIOD1] et [PERIOD2] ?
queries.sql: WITH period1 AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'accepté' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS accepted_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'refusé' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected_count, ROUND(AVG(q.total_ttc), 2) AS average_amount, ROUND(SUM(q.total_ttc), 2) AS total_amount FROM quotations q JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE q.issue_date BETWEEN '[PERIOD1_START]'::date AND '[PERIOD1_END]'::date), period2 AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'accepté' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS accepted_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rqs.code = 'refusé' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected_count, ROUND(AVG(q.total_ttc), 2) AS average_amount, ROUND(SUM(q.total_ttc), 2) AS total_amount FROM quotations q JOIN ref_quotation_status rqs ON q.status = rqs.id WHERE q.issue_date BETWEEN '[PERIOD2_START]'::date AND '[PERIOD2_END]'::date) SELECT p1.total_count AS period1_total, p2.total_count AS period2_total, (p2.total_count - p1.total_count) AS count_diff, ROUND(((p2.total_count - p1.total_count)::decimal / NULLIF(p1.total_count, 0)) * 100, 2) AS count_diff_percent, p1.accepted_count AS period1_accepted, p2.accepted_count AS period2_accepted, p1.rejected_count AS period1_rejected, p2.rejected_count AS period2_rejected, p1.average_amount AS period1_avg, p2.average_amount AS period2_avg, p1.total_amount AS period1_total_amount, p2.total_amount AS period2_total_amount, (p2.total_amount - p1.total_amount) AS amount_diff, ROUND(((p2.total_amount - p1.total_amount)::decimal / NULLIF(p1.total_amount, 0)) * 100, 2) AS amount_diff_percent FROM period1 p1, period2 p2
queries.description: Analyse comparative des devis entre deux périodes

parameters.name: PERIOD1_START
parameters.description: Date de début de la première période (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: PERIOD1_END
parameters.description: Date de fin de la première période (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: PERIOD2_START
parameters.description: Date de début de la deuxième période (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: PERIOD2_END
parameters.description: Date de fin de la deuxième période (YYYY-MM-DD)

questions: Quel est le montant total des devis acceptés ?
Montant total cumulé des devis acceptés
Quel est le montant des devis acceptés ?
Combien représentent tous les devis acceptés ?
Quel est le montant des devis accepté ?
queries.sql: SELECT SUM(quotations.total_ttc) AS montant_total_ttc FROM quotations JOIN ref_quotation_status ON quotations.status = ref_quotation_status.id WHERE ref_quotation_status.code = 'accepté'
queries.description: Montant total cumulé de tous les devis acceptés dans la base de données

questions: Quel est le montant des devis acceptés du mois en cours ?
Montant des devis acceptés du mois
Quel est le montant des devis acceptés du mois en cours ?
Montant cumulé des devis acceptés ce mois-ci
Somme des devis acceptés du mois
Total des devis validés ce mois
Valeur des devis acceptés ce mois-ci
Combien représentent les devis acceptés du mois ?
Montant des devis acceptés ce mois
Total des devis acceptés du mois en cours
queries.sql: SELECT SUM(quotations.total_ttc) AS montant_total_ttc FROM quotations JOIN ref_quotation_status ON quotations.status = ref_quotation_status.id WHERE ref_quotation_status.code = 'accepté' AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM quotations.updated_at) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM quotations.updated_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
queries.description: Montant total cumulé des devis acceptés pendant le mois en cours uniquement
